topics.name: 100–200 Level: Engineering Mathematics, Mechanics, and Materials Science
topics.description: ENG 101 Engineering Drawing, MEE 211 Engineering Mechanics, MEE 221 Materials Science.

subtopics.name: MEE 211: Statics and Dynamics
objectives: Resolve forces, moments, and couples in 2D and 3D static equilibrium problems
Apply Newton's laws to dynamics problems including kinematics, kinetics, and impulse-momentum

subtopics.name: MEE 221: Properties and Selection of Engineering Materials
objectives: Classify metals, polymers, ceramics, and composites by structure and mechanical properties
Select appropriate engineering materials based on strength, ductility, hardness, and cost criteria

topics.name: 300 Level: Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, and Manufacturing
topics.description: MEE 301 Engineering Thermodynamics, MEE 311 Fluid Mechanics, MEE 321 Manufacturing Processes.

subtopics.name: MEE 301: Thermodynamic Cycles and Heat Engines
objectives: Analyse Carnot, Rankine, and Otto cycles for power plant and IC engine applications
Apply first and second laws of thermodynamics to open and closed system analysis

subtopics.name: MEE 321: Casting, Forming, and Machining Operations
objectives: Describe sand casting, die casting, forging, and rolling manufacturing processes
Select appropriate cutting tools, speeds, feeds, and coolants for machining operations

topics.name: 400–500 Level: Machine Design, Vibration, Control & Final Project
topics.description: MEE 401 Machine Design, MEE 411 Mechanical Vibrations, MEE 499 Final Year Project.

subtopics.name: MEE 401: Design of Machine Elements
objectives: Design shafts, keys, couplings, gears, belts, and bearings under static and fatigue loading
Apply factor of safety, stress concentration, and failure theories to machine element design

subtopics.name: MEE 499: FUTO Final Year Engineering Design Project
objectives: Design and fabricate a mechanical system or component addressing a real industrial problem
Prepare comprehensive engineering design report and defend before FUTO School of Engineering
